channel.title: bbcnews TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from bbcnews

item.title: Police investigating the alleged murder of former MP and MEP Ann Widdecombe say there is "nothing to suggest it was politically motivated”. #AnnWiddecombe #DevonAndCornwallPolice #Devon #BBCNews
item.description: Police investigating the alleged murder of former MP and MEP Ann Widdecombe say there is "nothing to suggest it was politically motivated”. #AnnWiddecombe #DevonAndCornwallPolice #Devon #BBCNews

item.title: New York City artist Justin Gignac collected rubbish outside Madison Square Garden on the day of Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding. #TaylorSwift #TravisKelce #MadisonSquareGarden #MSG #NYC #Rubbish #Litter #USNews #News #BBCNews
item.description: New York City artist Justin Gignac collected rubbish outside Madison Square Garden on the day of Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding. #TaylorSwift #TravisKelce #MadisonSquareGarden #MSG #NYC #Rubbish #Litter #USNews #News #BBCNews

item.title: Former Conservative Chancellor turned Reform UK member, Nadhim Zahawi, clashes with Labour’s Miatta Fahnbulleh MP over Nigel Farage. The pair disagreed over the ongoing parliamentary investigation into an undeclared £5 million gift received by the Reform
item.description: Former Conservative Chancellor turned Reform UK member, Nadhim Zahawi, clashes with Labour’s Miatta Fahnbulleh MP over Nigel Farage. The pair disagreed over the ongoing parliamentary investigation into an undeclared £5 million gift received by the Reform

item.title: Hundreds of firefighters have been battling the fires, which have claimed the lives of 12 people, including four believed to be Britons, local authorities said. #Spain #Wildfires #Almeria #Bédar #BBCNews
item.description: Hundreds of firefighters have been battling the fires, which have claimed the lives of 12 people, including four believed to be Britons, local authorities said. #Spain #Wildfires #Almeria #Bédar #BBCNews

item.title: Republican Senator Lindsey Graham, a close ally of US President Donald Trump, died at the age of 71, following a "brief and sudden illness", according to his office. #US #LindseyGraham #Trump #America #BBCNews
item.description: Republican Senator Lindsey Graham, a close ally of US President Donald Trump, died at the age of 71, following a "brief and sudden illness", according to his office. #US #LindseyGraham #Trump #America #BBCNews

item.title: Thailand Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul told media at the scene that 27 bodies had been recovered, and others had been taken to hospital. The cause of the fire was still under investigation, he said. #Bangkok #Thailand #BBCNews
item.description: Thailand Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul told media at the scene that 27 bodies had been recovered, and others had been taken to hospital. The cause of the fire was still under investigation, he said. #Bangkok #Thailand #BBCNews

item.title: 84-year-old US Senator Mitch McConnell said in a statement he will not be returning to the Senate "quite yet" after suffering from a fall and "a mild case of pneumonia". This video has been re-uploaded with clarification that archive footage has been used
item.description: 84-year-old US Senator Mitch McConnell said in a statement he will not be returning to the Senate "quite yet" after suffering from a fall and "a mild case of pneumonia". This video has been re-uploaded with clarification that archive footage has been used

item.title: The actor Sam Neill, known for his roles in the Jurassic Park films, has died aged 78. His family says "the loss was sudden and unexpected", adding he died in Sydney "surrounded by family." #SamNeill #JurassicPark #NewZealand #Ireland #Actor #FilmTok #BBC
item.description: The actor Sam Neill, known for his roles in the Jurassic Park films, has died aged 78. His family says "the loss was sudden and unexpected", adding he died in Sydney "surrounded by family." #SamNeill #JurassicPark #NewZealand #Ireland #Actor #FilmTok #BBC

item.title: Who is the suspected Chinese drug kingpin allegedly controlling the drug trade between China, Mexico and the US? #Mexico #China #BBCGlobalEye #BBCNews
item.description: Who is the suspected Chinese drug kingpin allegedly controlling the drug trade between China, Mexico and the US? #Mexico #China #BBCGlobalEye #BBCNews

item.title: Has a hole been left in the global trade of fentanyl after the arrest of Zhang Zhidong, known as ‘Brother Wang’, a suspected Chinese drug kingpin? #Mexico #China #BBCNews
item.description: Has a hole been left in the global trade of fentanyl after the arrest of Zhang Zhidong, known as ‘Brother Wang’, a suspected Chinese drug kingpin? #Mexico #China #BBCNews

item.title: Wildfires continued to burn across Spain over the weekend, as the country experienced a sustained heatwave with temperatures of around 40C. #Wildfires #Teruel #Spain #BBCNews
item.description: Wildfires continued to burn across Spain over the weekend, as the country experienced a sustained heatwave with temperatures of around 40C. #Wildfires #Teruel #Spain #BBCNews

item.title: Early on Monday, officials said the fire had raced across 800 hectares and was still spreading in the Fontainebleau forest, near Paris. #Wildfire #Fontainebleau #Paris #France #Heatwave #BBCNews
item.description: Early on Monday, officials said the fire had raced across 800 hectares and was still spreading in the Fontainebleau forest, near Paris. #Wildfire #Fontainebleau #Paris #France #Heatwave #BBCNews

item.title: A 28-year-old white British man from Rotherham, South Yorkshire, was originally arrested on suspicion of murder on Saturday, but has now been re-arrested "on suspicion of commission, preparation or instigation of acts of terrorism", police said. #AnnWidde
item.description: A 28-year-old white British man from Rotherham, South Yorkshire, was originally arrested on suspicion of murder on Saturday, but has now been re-arrested "on suspicion of commission, preparation or instigation of acts of terrorism", police said. #AnnWidde

item.title: Volunteers are being recruited, with the first doses expected to be given to healthy adults in the UK "within weeks". #Ebola #Vaccine #Oxford #BBCNews
item.description: Volunteers are being recruited, with the first doses expected to be given to healthy adults in the UK "within weeks". #Ebola #Vaccine #Oxford #BBCNews

item.title: A huge fire tore through a bar in Bangkok late on Sunday, killing at least 28 people and leaving 25 critically injured. The blaze started near the stage of the bar in the popular Chatuchak district, then spread rapidly, cutting power and engulfing the roo
item.description: A huge fire tore through a bar in Bangkok late on Sunday, killing at least 28 people and leaving 25 critically injured. The blaze started near the stage of the bar in the popular Chatuchak district, then spread rapidly, cutting power and engulfing the roo

item.title: The actor Sam Neill, known for his roles in the Jurassic Park films, has died aged 78. #SamNeill #JurassicPark #PeakyBlinders #BBCNews
item.description: The actor Sam Neill, known for his roles in the Jurassic Park films, has died aged 78. #SamNeill #JurassicPark #PeakyBlinders #BBCNews

item.title: At least 28 people have been killed, and 25 critically injured after a fire tore through a bar in Bangkok late on Sunday. #Bangkok #Thailand #Asia #News #BBCNews
item.description: At least 28 people have been killed, and 25 critically injured after a fire tore through a bar in Bangkok late on Sunday. #Bangkok #Thailand #Asia #News #BBCNews

item.title: Firefighters work for a second day to bring a large wildfire south of Paris under control, as France’s Interior minister Laurent Nunez says it could have been set deliberately. #Wildfires #France #Paris #FontainebleauForest #BBCNews
item.description: Firefighters work for a second day to bring a large wildfire south of Paris under control, as France’s Interior minister Laurent Nunez says it could have been set deliberately. #Wildfires #France #Paris #FontainebleauForest #BBCNews

item.title: Tributes have been paid to actor Sam Neill, famed for his starring role in Jurassic Park, following his death at the age of 78. #SamNeill #JurassicPark #PeakyBlinders #BBCNews
item.description: Tributes have been paid to actor Sam Neill, famed for his starring role in Jurassic Park, following his death at the age of 78. #SamNeill #JurassicPark #PeakyBlinders #BBCNews

item.title: Ndodana Mkhanyisi Tshuma, also known as Mark, is wanted in connection with the Bedfordshire murders of his wife, Zandile, and his two daughters, Natalie, who was 15, and Nala, who was 5. #Bedfordshire #GreatDenham #Johannesburg #SouthAfrica #BBCNews
item.description: Ndodana Mkhanyisi Tshuma, also known as Mark, is wanted in connection with the Bedfordshire murders of his wife, Zandile, and his two daughters, Natalie, who was 15, and Nala, who was 5. #Bedfordshire #GreatDenham #Johannesburg #SouthAfrica #BBCNews

item.title: Should you have to work if it gets too hot? #Heatwave #WorkersRights #Weather #Jobs #UKWeather #UKPolitics #BBCNews
item.description: Should you have to work if it gets too hot? #Heatwave #WorkersRights #Weather #Jobs #UKWeather #UKPolitics #BBCNews

item.title: A meningitis B outbreak in Kent earlier this year claimed the lives of two young people. #Meningitis #MenB #Kent #UniTok #University #BBCNews
item.description: A meningitis B outbreak in Kent earlier this year claimed the lives of two young people. #Meningitis #MenB #Kent #UniTok #University #BBCNews

item.title: Speaking to MPs in the House of Commons, Home Secretary Shabana Mahmood said counter terrorism police are now leading the investigation into Ann Widdecombe's death and are investigating multiple lines of inquiry to establish the "motivation for this attac
item.description: Speaking to MPs in the House of Commons, Home Secretary Shabana Mahmood said counter terrorism police are now leading the investigation into Ann Widdecombe's death and are investigating multiple lines of inquiry to establish the "motivation for this attac

item.title: Counter-terrorism police have confirmed they are now leading an investigation into the alleged murder of former MP and MEP Ann Widdecombe. #UK #Police #Crime #News #BBCNews
item.description: Counter-terrorism police have confirmed they are now leading an investigation into the alleged murder of former MP and MEP Ann Widdecombe. #UK #Police #Crime #News #BBCNews

item.title: Symptoms of meningitis B can often be mistaken for a fever or a hangover, and is prone to spreading between those who live in close proximity and share things such as drinks and vapes. #Meningitis #MenB #Kent #UniTok #University #BBCNews
item.description: Symptoms of meningitis B can often be mistaken for a fever or a hangover, and is prone to spreading between those who live in close proximity and share things such as drinks and vapes. #Meningitis #MenB #Kent #UniTok #University #BBCNews

item.title: A rare red heat alert was issued for parts of England and Wales during June, warning even healthy people of the significant risk to life. #Heatwave #Hot #Weather #UK #BBCNews
item.description: A rare red heat alert was issued for parts of England and Wales during June, warning even healthy people of the significant risk to life. #Heatwave #Hot #Weather #UK #BBCNews

item.title: US Senator Mitch McConnell reappears and breaks his silence But will it stop the conspiracy theories? BBC chief anchor in Washington D.C. Sumi Somaskanda explains all on the latest Americast. Americast | Listen on BBC Sounds
item.description: US Senator Mitch McConnell reappears and breaks his silence But will it stop the conspiracy theories? BBC chief anchor in Washington D.C. Sumi Somaskanda explains all on the latest Americast. Americast | Listen on BBC Sounds

item.title: Do politicians need greater security? Counter terrorism police are now leading the investigation into the death of Former Conservative MP Ann Widdecombe. #BBCNewscast #Politics #UKPolitics #Crime #BBCNews
item.description: Do politicians need greater security? Counter terrorism police are now leading the investigation into the death of Former Conservative MP Ann Widdecombe. #BBCNewscast #Politics #UKPolitics #Crime #BBCNews

item.title: Malcolm and his wife Annette headed back to their house in the village of Bédar, which was consumed by flames last Thursday evening, to rescue their two cats. #Spain #Wildfire #SpainWildfire #Europe #News #BBCNews
item.description: Malcolm and his wife Annette headed back to their house in the village of Bédar, which was consumed by flames last Thursday evening, to rescue their two cats. #Spain #Wildfire #SpainWildfire #Europe #News #BBCNews

item.title: Actor Sam Neill, who has died at the age of 78, was best known for starring in the Jurassic Park movies - but that was just the tip of the iceberg. #SamNeill #JurassicPark #BBCNews
item.description: Actor Sam Neill, who has died at the age of 78, was best known for starring in the Jurassic Park movies - but that was just the tip of the iceberg. #SamNeill #JurassicPark #BBCNews
